items.claim: Cody Gibson is 38 years old and coming off a brutal first-minute knockout loss.
items.quote: 38 years old at bantamweight coming off of a brutal knockout loss in the first minute.

items.claim: Cody Gibson is hitable and tends to make mistakes on the ground.
items.quote: He's always been hitable. He's always made a lot of mistakes in the mat.

items.claim: Abdul Hussein has 15 wins with 14 coming inside the distance.
items.quote: this guy has 15 wins. 14 of those wins come inside the distance.

items.claim: Abdul Hussein has insane power and is a really good wrestler and grappler.
items.quote: this guy's power is insane, but not only that, he's a really good wrestler, and he's a phenomenal grappler as well.

items.claim: Mike Davis has stated that he does not like to fight.
items.quote: He's came out and said that he doesn't like to fight.

items.claim: Mike Davis has dealt with injury after injury over the last several years.
items.quote: the last several years, you know, he's dealt with injury after injury.

items.claim: Mike Davis pulled guard in the first 10 seconds and gassed out in his fight against Farat Zhalgasbayev.
items.quote: he went out there, he pulled guard in the first 10 seconds of the fight... as the fight went on, he gassed out.
